TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Masitoban ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Nin'ay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 188 buwan, 450 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 422 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 28 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 90%, Setik 1%, Bunun 1%, Amis 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Masitoban hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Masitoban hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Masitoban hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Masitoban hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Masitoban hya' ga bayi. tay 'llaw na Masitoban hya' ga kobah. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ mas~ɕitoβan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu ninʔaj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, s~ɕetik *%, βunun *%, amis~ɕ *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na mas~ɕitoβan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na mas~ɕitoβan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na mas~ɕitoβan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na mas~ɕitoβan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na mas~ɕitoβan ħjaʔ ɣa βaji. taj ʔllaw na mas~ɕitoβan ħjaʔ ɣa koβaħ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Masitoban ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Nin'ay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 188 buwan, 450 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 422 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 28 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 90%, Setik 1%, Bunun 1%, Amis 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Masitoban hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Masitoban hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Masitoban hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Masitoban hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Masitoban hya' ga bayi. tay 'llaw na Masitoban hya' ga kobah. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ mas~ɕitoβan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu ninʔaj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, s~ɕetik *%, βunun *%, amis~ɕ *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na mas~ɕitoβan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na mas~ɕitoβan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na mas~ɕitoβan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na mas~ɕitoβan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na mas~ɕitoβan ħjaʔ ɣa βaji. taj ʔllaw na mas~ɕitoβan ħjaʔ ɣa koβaħ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
